name: subscribers_list
description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscribers with optional filtering by status, tag, and date range.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by subscriber status. One of: active, cancelled, bounced, complained.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the value from the previous response.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of subscribers per page. Default 50, max 100.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date. Only return subscribers created after this date.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date. Only return subscribers created before this date.

parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description: Field to sort by. Default: created_at.
